title: Planned power outage: Industrial area
description: GEORGE NEWS - There is a planned power...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - There is a planned power outage for a portion of the Industrial area on Sunday 25 February from 08:00 to 16:00 for alterations to the electrical mains.


> The following streets will be affected:


- Laing Street
- Nywerheid Street

Consumers are warned to treat the installation as being live for the full duration as the supply may be resumed at any time within the notified period.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
